required_evidence: Review completeness tests, role/permission checks, decision receipts, and operator usability evidence.

title: Ship, export, or publish only under explicit authority and evidence
normative_requirement: The Studio shall permit final acceptance, export, scheduling, or publication only when the derivative satisfies required technical, Activative, primitive, archetype, Final Script, Voice/Visual DNA, source-lineage, evaluation, and autonomy-mode gates, and shall record the operator authority responsible.
trigger_preconditions: A derivative or batch is proposed for delivery or publication.
required_output_state: A publish/export command, delivery artifacts, metadata, signed URLs or integrations, usage records, and publication receipt.
authority_invariants: Review-before-ship requires final acceptance. | Source authority and revocation are rechecked at publish time. | Publication does not imply certification.
positive_acceptance: Given a passed short in REVIEW_BEFORE_SHIP mode, when the operator approves, then the final artifact and source/evidence bundle are exported and the decision is captured.
adversarial_denial: Given a passed SHADOW artifact, when publish is requested, then the command is denied.
required_evidence: Delivery-profile validation, source-authority checks, mode/authority tests, artifact hashes, and publication receipt.

title: Route each Harness to the correct supervisory surfaces and live read models
normative_requirement: Every Atomic Harness or derivative job shall declare its primary and supporting Studio surfaces, operator-entry policy, visible evidence, permitted commands, and realtime projections without allowing the Studio plugin to change Harness meaning or runtime ownership.
trigger_preconditions: A Harness is imported, bound, or launched.
required_output_state: A StudioSurfaceBinding and validated module/read-model/action configuration.
authority_invariants: UI plugins are nonauthoritative projections. | Unsupported surfaces cannot infer tools or state. | Module version changes are compatibility-tested.
positive_acceptance: Given a short-video Harness, when imported, then Video Production is primary and Visual Asset and Knowledge/Model modules are supporting surfaces with bounded commands.
adversarial_denial: Given a plugin that exposes an ungranted provider action, when binding validation runs, then the plugin/action is rejected.
required_evidence: Surface-binding schema, permission/action tests, realtime projection tests, and compatibility receipt.

title: Declare the viewer psychological role inside a named tension
normative_requirement: Every derivative job shall declare the psychological role offered to the viewer, the meaningful tension that makes the role available, the intended movement through that tension, and the evidence connecting the tension to the source.
trigger_preconditions: An Expression Moment or source-backed premise is proposed for derivative routing.
required_output_state: A PsychologicalRoleInTension contract attached to the archetype-routing decision.
authority_invariants: The role is specific enough to evaluate. | The tension comes from source and Matrix of Edging evidence. | A topic or emotion label alone is insufficient.
positive_acceptance: Given an Expression Moment about inherited silence, when routed, then the contract names the viewer role, such as witness, recognizer, challenger, or participant, and the tension the viewer enters.
adversarial_denial: Given a generic “inspire the audience” intention, when validation runs, then routing is blocked because no psychological role or live tension is declared.
required_evidence: Source spans, Matrix of Edging trace, role/tension evaluation, and operator approval receipt.

title: Compile broad signal, coalition signature, and Edge Product through Matrix of Edging
normative_requirement: The system shall distinguish pre-expression broad primary signal from post-expression Edge Product formation and shall compile surviving primitive candidates into one measurable Coalition Signature.
trigger_preconditions: Source expression is accepted and an archetype route is requested.
required_output_state: A MatrixOfEdgingResult containing broad signal lineage, candidate survival, coalition signature, Edge Product, and routeability.
authority_invariants: Primitives are not edges. | Unsupported cleverness does not survive. | Coalition fatality remains visible.
positive_acceptance: Given a truth-rich source answer, when the Matrix pass runs, then broad pressure, surviving primitive candidates, coalition geometry, and the emergent Edge Product remain separately inspectable.
adversarial_denial: Given an Edge Product invented directly from a topic label without primitive survival, when validation runs, then it is rejected.
required_evidence: Candidate survival scores, coalition geometry, fatality cases, and routeability receipts.

title: Compile an archetype coalition for every derivative
normative_requirement: Each derivative shall bind a primary archetype, supporting archetype functions, asset-derivative route, category grammar, psychological geometry, and tension progression as one versioned ArchetypeCoalitionContract.
trigger_preconditions: An Edge Product and content-batch job are accepted.
required_output_state: An ArchetypeCoalitionContract eligible for script compilation.
authority_invariants: Archetype is a psychological geometry, not a theme label. | Supporting archetypes cannot blur the primary role. | Category and substrate remain explicit.
positive_acceptance: Given one Edge Product, when a Carousel and short-video route are created, then each receives a category-native archetype coalition sharing source force without sharing a flattened template.
adversarial_denial: Given three attractive archetype labels with no primary geometry or sequence law, when validation runs, then the coalition is rejected.
required_evidence: Archetype registry trace, coalition compatibility, category crosswalk, and CBAR audit.

title: Compile text-bearing content through Guest Voice DNA
normative_requirement: JIT Skill script writers and Composers shall write or rewrite non-verbatim text through the active Guest Voice DNA, source evidence, Edge Product, archetype coalition, and Distillation Layers; verbatim quotations shall remain marked as verbatim.
trigger_preconditions: A derivative needs a headline, claim, slide copy, caption, overlay, voiceover, or animation line.
required_output_state: A VoiceDNAConstrainedScriptDraft with source and transformation lineage.
authority_invariants: No anonymous generic brand voice. | Rewriting preserves source truth and guest cadence. | Verbatim and rewritten language are distinguishable.
positive_acceptance: Given a dense interview answer, when Carousel copy is compiled, then the slides sound like the guest while using category-native compression rather than copying raw transcript mechanically.
adversarial_denial: Given polished copy that could belong to any creator, when Voice DNA evaluation runs, then the draft is rejected or repaired.
required_evidence: Voice DNA version, source-span crosswalk, distillation trace, contrastive examples, and VoiceContinuity evaluation.

title: Approve one archetype-coalition Final Script before composition
normative_requirement: No Composition IR, VideoEditProgram, animation scene program, visual generation demand, or renderer workspace may be compiled until one versioned Final Script passes source fidelity, Voice DNA, archetype, primitive, Activative, and operator approval gates.
trigger_preconditions: A script draft is proposed as the content substrate for a derivative.
required_output_state: An approved FinalScript record or a typed repair request.
authority_invariants: Composition cannot conceal an unresolved script. | Approval pins the exact source and coalition versions. | Later revisions create a new script version.
positive_acceptance: Given a source-led short, when the Final Script is approved, then selected source words, overlay copy, scene roles, animation opportunities, and primitive obligations are fixed before timeline composition.
adversarial_denial: Given a renderer-ready layout with no approved Final Script, when execution is requested, then composition is blocked.
required_evidence: Final Script review, source-fidelity evaluation, primitive receipt, archetype receipt, and operator decision.

title: Preserve role, tension, coalition, and Final Script lineage through every embodiment
normative_requirement: Every content-bearing object and rendered artifact shall link to the PsychologicalRoleInTension contract, Matrix result, Primitive Coalition Contract, Archetype Coalition Contract, Final Script, source spans, and transformation history.
trigger_preconditions: Any downstream composition, generation, edit, repair, or export is created.
required_output_state: Complete doctrine-to-artifact lineage and invalidation edges.
authority_invariants: A renderer cannot erase upstream reason. | A repair cannot change the role or tension silently. | Cross-format reuse retains the originating coalition.
positive_acceptance: Given one animation scene reused as video B-roll and on a Carousel slide, when audited, then both uses resolve to the same source, Edge Product, primitive coalition, archetype coalition, and Final Script version.
adversarial_denial: Given an asset copied into another derivative without coalition lineage, when validation runs, then the use is rejected.
required_evidence: Lineage graph, selective invalidation tests, cross-format reuse receipts, and replay proof.

title: Query current Meaning and Experience Primitive Families
normative_requirement: Before script or composition strategy is selected, the Pipeline shall query eligible Meaning and Experience Primitive Families using source evidence, psychological role, tension, archetype, category, Brand Context Version, and execution stage.
trigger_preconditions: An accepted Edge Product enters derivative planning.
required_output_state: A bounded primitive candidate field with activation, suppression, synergy, conflict, and misuse metadata.
authority_invariants: Primitive retrieval precedes recipe selection. | Meaning and Experience planes remain distinct. | Primitive IDs are current and versioned.
positive_acceptance: Given a SuperVisual concept, when primitives are queried, then meaning-transform, delivery-shape, and format-material candidates are returned with reasons and conflicts.
adversarial_denial: Given a preferred layout template, when it attempts to backfill primitive labels after selection, then the route is rejected.
required_evidence: Primitive registry queries, eligibility results, exclusions, and source-to-primitive rationale.

title: Create explicit Primitive Bindings
normative_requirement: Every selected primitive shall be bound with plane, family, role, activation reason, source evidence, suppression conditions, misuse risks, and evaluation targets.
trigger_preconditions: Primitive candidates survive selection for one derivative.
required_output_state: Versioned PrimitiveBinding records.
authority_invariants: A primitive label without activation reason is invalid. | Misuse and conflict metadata travel with the binding. | Required bindings reference evidence.
positive_acceptance: Given an Irony Inversion primitive, when bound, then its source contradiction, intended role, suppression conditions, and misuse evaluation are explicit.
adversarial_denial: Given a primitive chosen because it is fashionable or frequently used, when no source or coalition reason exists, then binding fails.
required_evidence: Binding validation, source evidence, suppression tests, and primitive-role coverage.

title: Compile the Primitive Coalition Contract before recipe selection
normative_requirement: Primary, supporting, suppression, and conflict bindings shall compile into one PrimitiveCoalitionContract with coalition intent, signature, coverage threshold, misuse threshold, source context, and content hash before Steering Recipes or composition methods are selected.
trigger_preconditions: Primitive Bindings are accepted for a derivative.
required_output_state: An immutable PrimitiveCoalitionContract.
authority_invariants: Coalition precedes Steering Recipe. | Coalition intent preserves psychological role and Edge Product. | Conflicts have explicit resolution.
positive_acceptance: Given a Carousel route, when the coalition compiles, then the exact meaning transform, delivery force, progression function, format material, and suppression bindings are fixed before slide composition.
adversarial_denial: Given a Steering Recipe that has no compatible Primitive Coalition Contract, when retrieval returns it, then it is excluded.
required_evidence: Coalition hash, coverage checks, conflict tests, recipe-compatibility tests, and operator inspection.

title: Emit Coalition Signature and Edge Product as measurable execution objects
normative_requirement: The coalition compiler shall emit the weighted family/candidate geometry, synergy, redundancy, routeability, and resulting Edge Product as separate measurable objects available to scripts, composition, evaluation, and learning.
trigger_preconditions: A PrimitiveCoalitionContract is finalized.
required_output_state: CoalitionSignature and EdgeProduct records.
authority_invariants: Edge Product is emergent, not a renamed primitive. | Redundancy and fatality remain measurable. | Routeability is category-specific.
positive_acceptance: Given multiple surviving primitives, when the signature forms, then the system can explain which geometry produces recognition, humor exposure, mechanism reveal, or another Edge Product.
adversarial_denial: Given a coalition with high local charge but no routeable category expression, when evaluated, then coalition fatality is recorded rather than hidden.
required_evidence: Signature vectors, routeability scores, fatality fixtures, and category crosswalks.

title: Build Steering Recipes from primitive coalitions
normative_requirement: Steering Recipes shall be compiled or retrieved as execution strategies for a specific Primitive Coalition Contract, archetype coalition, composition state, embodiment, and known failure; they shall never act as the upstream source of the creative recipe.
trigger_preconditions: A coalition and Final Script are approved and composition planning begins.
required_output_state: An eligible Steering Recipe set linked to coalition and embodiment.
authority_invariants: Primitives build the recipe. | Steering Recipes operationalize and repair it. | Applicability and contradictory precedents are explicit.
positive_acceptance: Given a weak identity-anchor composition, when recipes are retrieved, then only strategies compatible with its primitive coalition, archetype, Visual DNA, and current geometry are considered.
adversarial_denial: Given a visually similar recipe that would suppress the coalition’s recognition edge, when ranking runs, then it is excluded or returned as a contradiction.
required_evidence: Coalition-to-recipe crosswalk, hard negatives, retrieval receipt, and downstream decision lift.

title: Emit Primitive Evaluation Receipts and misuse/fatality diagnosis
normative_requirement: Each script, composition, provider plan, render, sequence, and repair shall receive a Primitive Evaluation Receipt measuring required primitive coverage, misuse risk, coalition integrity, Edge Product survival, and responsible repair layer.
trigger_preconditions: A content-bearing candidate or final artifact is evaluated.
required_output_state: PrimitiveEvaluationReceipt plus pass, repair-required, or blocked decision.
authority_invariants: Producer cannot approve itself. | Coverage does not hide misuse. | Repair preserves already-valid primitive relationships.
positive_acceptance: Given a polished SuperVisual with weak delivery-shape coverage, when evaluated, then the receipt identifies the missing role and a bounded repair target.
adversarial_denial: Given high aesthetic scores but collapsed edge integrity or excess primitive misuse risk, when final evaluation runs, then the artifact cannot pass.
required_evidence: Primitive coverage benchmark, misuse corpus, coalition fatality cases, independent evaluation, and repair replay.

title: Load Brand Genesis Session and active Brand Context Version
normative_requirement: A brand-bound campaign shall resolve the accepted Brand Genesis Session outputs and one active Brand Context Version before script, visual research, primitive selection, or composition.
trigger_preconditions: A campaign or derivative is associated with a brand workspace.
required_output_state: A pinned BrandContextBinding available to JIT Capsules.
authority_invariants: Brand context is versioned. | Historical versions remain replayable. | Brand context cannot override source truth or Activative Intelligence.
positive_acceptance: Given a campaign for one guest brand, when composition begins, then the active Brand Context Version is loaded with its identity, visual, voice, micro-semiotic, and negative-space context.
adversarial_denial: Given two active Brand Context Versions with unresolved precedence, when a job launches, then it is blocked pending operator selection.
required_evidence: Brand version resolution, JIT inclusion receipt, replay, and supersession tests.

title: Apply Voice DNA and Visual DNA as separate composition contracts
normative_requirement: Voice DNA shall constrain linguistic cadence, syntax, pressure, intimacy, and anti-draft behavior; Visual DNA shall constrain identity geometry, visual constitution, material language, color, typography, texture, motion, and visual Negative Space.
trigger_preconditions: A text-bearing or visual derivative is drafted.
required_output_state: VoiceDNAContract and VisualDNAContract bindings with evaluations.
authority_invariants: Voice DNA is not a generic tone adjective. | Visual DNA is not a moodboard label. | Source fidelity remains upstream of both.
positive_acceptance: Given a guest with a reflective but confrontational voice pattern and tactile visual language, when content is composed, then text and visuals preserve those separate constraints.
adversarial_denial: Given a polished output using generic motivational copy or generic premium visual style, when DNA evaluation runs, then it is rejected or repaired.
required_evidence: Contrastive Voice/Visual DNA fixtures, version pins, composition checks, and operator labels.

title: Apply RSCS Distillation Layers before script approval
normative_requirement: The JIT script pipeline shall apply explicit Distillation Layers implementing RSCS saturation, collision detection, compression, evaluation, and recursion so that source density survives reduction into category-native copy and scene programs.
trigger_preconditions: Source expression is condensed or rewritten into a derivative script.
required_output_state: A DistillationTrace linking source saturation, collisions, compressed claims, rejected generic drafts, and recursive revisions.
authority_invariants: Saturation precedes compression. | Meaning emerges through source-backed collision. | Compression cannot invent missing signal.
positive_acceptance: Given a long interview answer, when distilled into six Carousel slides, then each compression step preserves irreducible signal and identifies the tension or recognition collision it carries.
adversarial_denial: Given a clean summary that removes all specificity and costly exposure, when RSCS evaluation runs, then it fails signal-density and reality-contact gates.
required_evidence: Distillation traces, density benchmark, source-contact evaluation, and rejected centroid drafts.

title: Use CCV for controlled archetype and composition variation
normative_requirement: Candidate generation shall vary explicit archetype, emotional register, Voice DNA register, intensity, audience maturity, representation geometry, and category-compatible composition axes while remaining anchored to RSCS-compressed truth and CBAR constraints.
trigger_preconditions: The Harness requests multiple valid candidates or a novel category-native expression.
required_output_state: A CCVVariationPlan and diverse candidate portfolio.
authority_invariants: Variation axes are explicit and separable. | Novelty does not erase source truth. | Candidates differ meaningfully, not only by seed.
positive_acceptance: Given one Edge Product, when three SuperVisual candidates are requested, then they occupy distinct controlled coordinates while preserving the same source and coalition.
adversarial_denial: Given three near-identical candidates that drift toward the same generic social aesthetic, when diversity evaluation runs, then the portfolio fails.
required_evidence: Axis coordinates, diversity measures, source-fidelity checks, and comparative evaluation.

title: Apply SDA and SFL crosswalks to semantic geometry and delivery function
normative_requirement: The Pipeline shall resolve current SDA invariants, representation and archetypal geometries, plus SFL function, compression, surface, and failure-corpus crosswalks for the active archetype, primitive coalition, category, and output surface.
trigger_preconditions: A Final Script or composition program is compiled.
required_output_state: An SDA/SFLContextPacket and evaluation obligations.
authority_invariants: Semantic direction and delivery function are distinct. | Surface adaptation cannot corrupt invariant geometry. | Known SFL failure patterns become hard negatives.
positive_acceptance: Given a source-backed claim moving from video to Carousel, when crosswalks compile, then the invariant meaning remains stable while delivery function and compression adapt to the surface.
adversarial_denial: Given a surface adaptation that preserves words but reverses the archetypal geometry or overresolves meaning, when evaluated, then it fails.
required_evidence: SDA ontology crosswalk, SFL profile, failure-corpus tests, and surface comparison receipts.

title: Enforce Source Fidelity, Negative Space, and Edge Integrity across all handoffs
normative_requirement: Every script, composition, edit, generation, render, and repair shall measure source fidelity, linguistic and visual Negative Space, focal and peripheral Edge Integrity, anti-centroid charge preservation, and the survival of the intended viewer role inside tension.
trigger_preconditions: Any content-bearing state crosses a workflow handoff or is proposed for acceptance.
required_output_state: A DoctrineIntegrityReceipt with per-layer verdicts and repair ownership.
authority_invariants: Centroid polish cannot compensate for lost force. | Negative Space is active structure, not unused area. | Edge Integrity survives source-to-script-to-composition-to-render.
positive_acceptance: Given a short-video edit, when evaluated, then the system proves that source specificity, reaction tension, visual asymmetry, peripheral cues, and the viewer’s role survived the final render.
adversarial_denial: Given a technically correct and visually polished artifact that neutralizes the Edge Product, when doctrine evaluation runs, then acceptance is denied and the responsible handoff is identified.
required_evidence: Cross-handoff doctrine receipts, anti-centroid benchmarks, negative-space metrics, Visual Syntax reparse, and operator calibration.
